arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Client VPN endpoint.

authentication_options.description: List of authentication options used by the Client VPN endpoint.

client_cidr_block.description: The CIDR block of the client IP address range.

client_connect_options.description: Options for client connection, including lambda function for customization.

client_login_banner_options.description: Options for displaying a login banner to clients.

client_vpn_endpoint_id.description: The ID of the Client VPN endpoint.

connection_log_options.description: Options for logging connection activities to CloudWatch.

description.description: A description of the Client VPN endpoint.

dns_name.description: The DNS name for the Client VPN endpoint.

dns_servers.description: List of DNS server IP addresses for the VPN clients.

id.description: The ID assigned to the Client VPN endpoint.

security_group_ids.description: List of security group IDs associated with the Client VPN endpoint.

self_service_portal.description: Indicates whether the self-service portal is enabled.

self_service_portal_url.description: URL for the self-service portal of the Client VPN.

server_certificate_arn.description: ARN of the server certificate for the Client VPN endpoint.

session_timeout_hours.description: Number of hours a VPN session lasts before timing out.

split_tunnel.description: Indicates whether split tunneling is enabled.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the Client VPN endpoint.

transport_protocol.description: Transport protocol used by the VPN (e.g., UDP or TCP).

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC associated with the Client VPN endpoint.

vpn_port.description: Port number for the Client VPN endpoint.
